name: Bluelake Mineral AB (publ)
summary: Bluelake Mineral AB (publ) operates as a mineral exploration company. It explores for nickel and gold deposits, as well as hydrocarbons. The company owns interests in the R√É¬∂nnb√É¬§cken project, which covers an area of approximately 15 square kilometers located in V√É¬§sterbotten, Sweden; Orrb√É¬§cken project covering an area of approximately 261 hectares located in V√É¬§sterbotten, Sweden; and Kattisavan project covering 888 hectares located in Lapland, Sweden. It also owns interests in the Ellej-Igajskoje license located in Tomsk Oblast, Russia. The company was formerly known as Nickel Mountain Resources AB (publ) and changed its name to Bluelake Mineral AB (publ) in December 2020. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden. Bluelake Mineral AB (publ) is a subsidiary of Archelon AB (publ).
